channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Microsoft pulls Windows 11 KB5079391 preview after it causes install error loop on 25H2 and 24H2 - Windows Latest
item.description:
1. Microsoft pulls Windows 11 KB5079391 preview after it causes install error loop on 25H2 and 24H2  Windows Latest
  2. Microsoft reportedly sets movable taskbars to 'Priority 0' as it tries to improve Windows 11  XDA
  3. March’s optional Windows 11 update arrives with a key security feature  PCWorld
  4. Windows 11 has been getting better in secret — 6 features I wish I'd found sooner  MakeUseOf
  5. Microsoft releases Windows 11 KB5081494, KB5083482 setup and recovery updates  Neowin
